title: Rail Car Repairers
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul railroad rolling stock, mine cars, or mass transit rail cars.

tasks.text: Record conditions of cars, and repair and maintenance work performed or to be performed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect components such as bearings, seals, gaskets, wheels, and coupler assemblies to determine if repairs are needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective or worn parts such as bearings, pistons, and gears, using hand tools, torque wrenches, power tools, and welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect the interior and exterior of rail cars coming into rail yards to identify defects and to determine the extent of wear and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Remove locomotives, car mechanical units, or other components, using pneumatic hoists and jacks, pinch bars, hand tools, and cutting torches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test units for operability before and after repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust repaired or replaced units as needed to ensure proper operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair, fabricate, and install steel or wood fittings, using blueprints, shop sketches, and instruction manuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform scheduled maintenance, and clean units and components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine car roofs for wear and damage, and repair defective sections, using roofing material, cement, nails, and waterproof paint.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Paint car exteriors, interiors, and fixtures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Repair and maintain electrical and electronic controls for propulsion and braking systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble units such as water pumps, control valves, and compressors so that repairs can be made.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure diameters of axle wheel seats, using micrometers, and mark dimensions on axles so that wheels can be bored to specified dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test electrical systems of cars by operating systems and using testing equipment such as ammeters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace defective wiring and insulation, and tighten electrical connections, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install and repair interior flooring, fixtures, walls, plumbing, steps, and platforms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair window sash frames, attach weather stripping and channels to frames, and replace window glass, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align car sides for installation of car ends and crossties, using width gauges, turnbuckles, and wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair car upholstery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
